# Tommy

> Workforce management for teams that work in shifts. Schedule, clock, approve, and pay — without the spreadsheets.

## Documentation

- [Welcome to Tommy](/introduction): Workforce management for teams that work in shifts. Schedule, clock, approve, and pay — without the spreadsheets.
- [Quickstart](/quickstart): Sign up, create your team, invite a member, and publish your first shift in five minutes.
- [Core Concepts](/concepts): The Tommy vocabulary in one page. Team, member, shift, timesheet, location, role — and what they all mean.
- [Onboarding](/onboarding): From sign-up to a working team in under ten minutes.
- [Solutions](/solutions): Industry presets that ship with Tommy. Pick one when you create your team and start with the right roles, templates, and compliance built in.
- [Team Members](/team-members): Invite people, assign roles, scope to locations, manage documents, and deactivate when they leave.
- [Locations](/locations): Set up the places your team works. Locations scope shifts, verify time-clock attendance, and structure permissions.
- [Settings](/user-settings): Team settings (admins) and personal account settings (everyone). Profile, notifications, security, locations, roles, integrations.

## Workforce

- [Scheduling](/workforce/scheduling): Build shifts from templates, publish to your team, and manage swaps, drops, and open shifts.
- [Time Clock](/workforce/timeclock): Clock in and out from a phone, tablet kiosk, or web browser. With GPS, photo, geofencing, and breaks.
- [Timesheets](/workforce/timesheets): Submit, approve, and export. Timesheets build themselves from clocked time and flow to your accounting software.

## Integrations

- [Integrations](/integrations): Connect Tommy to the tools you already use. Accounting, payroll, point of sale.
- [Xero](/integrations/integrations-xero): Sync employees, push approved timesheets, and track invoices. Most popular in Australia, NZ, and the UK.
- [QuickBooks](/integrations/integrations-quickbooks): Sync employees, export approved timesheets, and import payroll items. Most popular in the US.
- [MYOB](/integrations/integrations-myob): Sync employees and export approved timesheets to MYOB. Australian payroll standard.
- [GoTab & Swift POS](/integrations/integrations-pos): Sync staff and roster with your point-of-sale. For hospitality and retail teams.

## API Reference

- [Tommy](/api): The Tommy API is organized around the [REST](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Representational_State_Transfer) methodology, and it uses resource-oriented URLs, and common HTTP response codes to indicate API errors. All requests are authenticated using an `api-key` which can be obtained from your developer dashboard.
- [Search users](/api#operation-accounts-search-get): GET /accounts/search — Get all users and teams who's mobile or username match the given search term.
- [Get the current user object](/api#operation-me-get): GET /me — Get the current user object.
- [Update the current user object](/api#operation-me-put): PUT /me — Update the current user object.
- [Get all accounts belonging to the current user](/api#operation-me-accounts-get): GET /me/accounts — Get all accounts belonging to the current user.
- [Get work-life score chart data for the current user](/api#operation-me-wls-get): GET /me/wls — Get work-life score chart data for the current user.
- [Get the current account](/api#operation-me-current-account-get): GET /me/current_account — Get the current user account.
- [Update the current account](/api#operation-me-current-account-put): PUT /me/current_account — Update the current user account. \ The current account may be a `User`, `Team`, or `TeamMember` type.
- [Get user settings](/api#operation-me-settings-get): GET /me/settings — Get user settings objects.
- [Get user setting value](/api#operation-me-settings-name-get): GET /me/settings/{name} — Get a user setting value.
- [Update user setting value](/api#operation-me-settings-name-put): PUT /me/settings/{name} — Update a user setting value.
- [Delete user setting value](/api#operation-me-settings-name-delete): DELETE /me/settings/{name} — Delete a user setting value.
- [Create a User on the system](/api#operation-users-post): POST /users — Create a User on the system.
- [Send a verification SMS](/api#operation-users-id-send-verification-sms-post): POST /users/{id}/send_verification_sms — Send an account verification SMS to the user's mobile number.
- [Send a verification email](/api#operation-users-id-send-verification-email-post): POST /users/{id}/send_verification_email — Send an account verification email to the user's email address.
- [Reset a user password](/api#operation-users-reset-password-post): POST /users/reset_password — Reset a user password for the account associated with the provided email address or mobile number.
- [Create a team](/api#operation-teams-post): POST /teams — Create a team.
- [Get the current team object](/api#operation-team-get): GET /team — Get the current team object.
- [Update the current team object](/api#operation-team-put): PUT /team — Update the current team object.
- [Get team settings](/api#operation-team-settings-get): GET /team/settings — Get team settings objects.
- [Update team features](/api#operation-team-features-patch): PATCH /team/features — Bulk update team feature flags. Unknown keys are ignored.
- [Get team setting value](/api#operation-team-settings-name-get): GET /team/settings/{name} — Get a team setting value.
- [Update team setting value](/api#operation-team-settings-name-put): PUT /team/settings/{name} — Update a team setting value.
- [Delete team setting value](/api#operation-team-settings-name-delete): DELETE /team/settings/{name} — Delete a team setting value.
- [Apply demo data](/api#operation-team-demo-data-apply-post): POST /team/demo_data/apply — Apply industry-specific demo data to the current team.
- [Reset demo data](/api#operation-team-demo-data-reset-delete): DELETE /team/demo_data/reset — Remove all generated demo data from the current team.
- [Get all members belonging to the current team](/api#operation-team-members-get): GET /team/members — Get all members belonging to the current team.
- [Get a team member](/api#operation-team-members-user-id-get): GET /team/members/{user_id} — Get a single team member object by it's corresponding user ID.
- [Update a team member](/api#operation-team-members-user-id-put): PUT /team/members/{user_id} — Update a single team member object.
- [Invite team member](/api#operation-team-members-invite-post): POST /team/members/invite — Invite a member to the current team.
- [Get all developers on the system](/api#operation-developers-get): GET /developers — Get all developers on the system.
- [Get a developer](/api#operation-developers-id-get): GET /developers/{id} — Get a developer object by user ID.
- [Get developer addons](/api#operation-developers-id-addons-get): GET /developers/{id}/addons — Get all addons for a specific developer.
- [Get developer actions](/api#operation-developers-id-actions-get): GET /developers/{id}/actions — Get all actions for a specific developer.
- [Get chat rooms](/api#operation-chats-get): GET /chats — Get all chat rooms.
- [Create chat room](/api#operation-chats-post): POST /chats — Create a chat room with multiple users.
- [Get or create chat room](/api#operation-chats-initiate-post): POST /chats/initiate — Get or create a chat room with multiple given users.
- [Get chat](/api#operation-chats-id-get): GET /chats/{id} — Get a single chat object by it's ID.
- [Update chat](/api#operation-chats-id-put): PUT /chats/{id} — Update a chat object.
- [Delete chat](/api#operation-chats-id-delete): DELETE /chats/{id} — Delete a chat object.
- [Get chat messages](/api#operation-chats-chat-id-messages-get): GET /chats/{chat_id}/messages — Get all messages belonging to the given chat.
- [Create create message](/api#operation-chats-chat-id-messages-post): POST /chats/{chat_id}/messages — Create a chat and send it to the chat participants.
- [Get chat message](/api#operation-chats-chat-id-messages-id-get): GET /chats/{chat_id}/messages/{id} — Get a chat message belonging to the given chat.
- [Delete chat message](/api#operation-chats-chat-id-messages-id-delete): DELETE /chats/{chat_id}/messages/{id} — Delete a chat message belonging to the given chat.
- [Get chat users](/api#operation-chats-chat-id-users-get): GET /chats/{chat_id}/users — Get all users participating in the given chat.
- [Create chat user](/api#operation-chats-chat-id-users-post): POST /chats/{chat_id}/users — Create and add a user to the chat.
- [Delete chat user](/api#operation-chats-chat-id-users-user-id-delete): DELETE /chats/{chat_id}/users/{user_id} — Delete a chat user.
- [Create reaction](/api#operation-chats-chat-id-reactions-post): POST /chats/{chat_id}/reactions — Create a reaction to a message in the chat.
- [Delete reaction](/api#operation-chats-chat-id-reactions-id-delete): DELETE /chats/{chat_id}/reactions/{id} — Delete a reaction from a message.
- [Create and send a chat message to the receiver](/api#operation-messages-post): POST /messages — Create and send a chat message to the receiver.
- [Update message](/api#operation-messages-id-put): PUT /messages/{id} — Update a message object.
- [Delete message](/api#operation-messages-id-delete): DELETE /messages/{id} — Delete a message object.
- [Get recent chat messages](/api#operation-messages-recent-get): GET /messages/recent — Get recent chat messages for the current account scope.
- [Get favorite chat messages](/api#operation-messages-favorite-get): GET /messages/favorite — Get favorite chat messages for the current account scope.
- [Get all addons](/api#operation-addons-get): GET /addons — Get all addons available for install by the current team or user.
- [Get recommended addons](/api#operation-addons-recommended-get): GET /addons/recommended — Get all recommended addons available for install by the current team or user.
- [Get popular addons](/api#operation-addons-popular-get): GET /addons/popular — Get all addons in order of popularity.
- [Get installed addons](/api#operation-addons-installed-get): GET /addons/installed — Get all addons installed for the current team or user.
- [Get an addon](/api#operation-addons-package-get): GET /addons/{package} — Get an addon by it's package name.
- [Report addon as inappropriate](/api#operation-addons-package-report-post): POST /addons/{package}/report — Report addon as inappropriate.
- [Get all actions](/api#operation-actions-get): GET /actions — Get all available actions.
- [Get popular actions](/api#operation-actions-popular-get): GET /actions/popular — Get all actions in order of popularity.
- [Get installed actions](/api#operation-actions-installed-get): GET /actions/installed — Get all installed actions for the current team or user.
- [Get recent actions](/api#operation-actions-recent-get): GET /actions/recent — Get recently used actions for the current team or user.
- [Get action](/api#operation-actions-id-get): GET /actions/{id} — Get a specific action by ID.
- [Get action variables](/api#operation-actions-id-variables-get): GET /actions/{id}/variables — Get variables for a specific action.
- [List action installs](/api#operation-actions-installs-get): GET /actions/installs — Get all action installs for the current team or user.
- [Install action](/api#operation-actions-installs-post): POST /actions/installs — Install an action for the current team or user.
- [Get installed action](/api#operation-actions-installs-id-get): GET /actions/installs/{id} — Get an action install by ID.
- [Update action install](/api#operation-actions-installs-id-put): PUT /actions/installs/{id} — Update an action install.
- [Delete installed action](/api#operation-actions-installs-id-delete): DELETE /actions/installs/{id} — Delete an action install.
- [Run an action](/api#operation-actions-installs-id-run-get): GET /actions/installs/{id}/run — Run an installed action.
- [Run an action later](/api#operation-actions-installs-id-run-later-get): GET /actions/installs/{id}/run_later — Schedule an installed action to run later.
- [Get action event history](/api#operation-actions-installs-id-history-get): GET /actions/installs/{id}/history — Get history for an installed action.
- [Get fragments](/api#operation-fragments-get): GET /fragments — Get all fragments.
- [Create an fragment](/api#operation-fragments-post): POST /fragments — Create an fragment
- [Get an fragment](/api#operation-fragments-id-get): GET /fragments/{id} — Get an fragment object.
- [Update an fragment](/api#operation-fragments-id-put): PUT /fragments/{id} — Update an fragment object.
- [Delete an fragment](/api#operation-fragments-id-delete): DELETE /fragments/{id} — Delete an fragment object.
- [Get contacts](/api#operation-contacts-get): GET /contacts — Get all contacts belonging to the current account.
- [Create contact](/api#operation-contacts-post): POST /contacts — Create a contact for a user that may not already exist on Tommy. The created user will be invited to join the current user or team.
- [Get a contact](/api#operation-contacts-friend-id-get): GET /contacts/{friend_id} — Get a contact object by friend user ID.
- [Update a contact](/api#operation-contacts-friend-id-put): PUT /contacts/{friend_id} — Update a single contact object.
- [Import bulk contacts](/api#operation-contacts-import-post): POST /contacts/import — Import bulk contacts from a mobile phone or other device. Imported contacts must provide `first_name` and `mobile` or `email` parameters.
- [Send contact request](/api#operation-contacts-friend-id-add-post): POST /contacts/{friend_id}/add — Send a contact request to join the given user or team.
- [Invite contact](/api#operation-contacts-friend-id-invite-post): POST /contacts/{friend_id}/invite — Invite the given user to become a contact of the current user or team.
- [Accept contact request](/api#operation-contacts-friend-id-accept-post): POST /contacts/{friend_id}/accept — Accept an incoming contact request from the given user.
- [Reject contact request](/api#operation-contacts-friend-id-decline-post): POST /contacts/{friend_id}/decline — Reject an incoming contact request from the given user.
- [Get all invitations associated with the current account](/api#operation-invitations-get): GET /invitations — Get all invitations associated with the current account.
- [Create invitation](/api#operation-invitations-post): POST /invitations — Create an invitation link for a member or non-menmer to connect with the current user or team.
- [Get invitations](/api#operation-invitations-token-get): GET /invitations/{token} — Get an invitations object by token.
- [Accept an invitation](/api#operation-invitations-token-accept-get): GET /invitations/{token}/accept — Accept an invitation belonging to the given token.
- [Reject an invitation](/api#operation-invitations-token-decline-get): GET /invitations/{token}/decline — Reject an invitation belonging to the given token.
- [Get events](/api#operation-events-get): GET /events — Get all events.
- [Create an event](/api#operation-events-post): POST /events — Create an event
- [Get an event](/api#operation-events-id-get): GET /events/{id} — Get an event object.
- [Update an event](/api#operation-events-id-put): PUT /events/{id} — Update an event object.
- [Delete an event](/api#operation-events-id-delete): DELETE /events/{id} — Delete an event object.
- [Login](/api#operation-sessions-post): POST /sessions — This method handles users who are \ authenticating with an email or phone, and password combination.
- [Logout](/api#operation-sessions-delete): DELETE /sessions — This method destroys the current user session.
- [Get wallet](/api#operation-wallet-get): GET /wallet — Get wallet owned by the current account.
- [Update a wallet](/api#operation-wallet-put): PUT /wallet — Update a wallet.
- [Get wallet cards](/api#operation-wallet-cards-get): GET /wallet/cards — Get wallet cards connected to the current account.
- [Get wallet accounts](/api#operation-wallet-accounts-get): GET /wallet/accounts — Get wallet accounts connected to the current account.
- [Get a wallet account](/api#operation-wallet-accounts-id-get): GET /wallet/accounts/{id} — Get a wallet account by ID.
- [Get wallet transactions](/api#operation-wallet-transactions-get): GET /wallet/transactions — Get wallet transactions belonging to the current account.
- [Create a wallet transaction](/api#operation-wallet-transactions-post): POST /wallet/transactions — Create a wallet transaction.
- [Get a wallet transaction](/api#operation-wallet-transactions-id-get): GET /wallet/transactions/{id} — Get a wallet transaction by ID.
- [Refund a wallet transaction](/api#operation-wallet-transactions-id-refund-post): POST /wallet/transactions/{id}/refund — Refund a wallet transaction by ID.
- [Get account](/api#operation-workforce-get): GET /workforce — Get account settings.
- [Update account](/api#operation-workforce-put): PUT /workforce — Update account settings.
- [Get employees as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-employees-get): GET /workforce/manager/employees — Get employees as manager.
- [Get an employee as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-employees-user-id-get): GET /workforce/manager/employees/{user_id} — Get an employee as manager by ID.
- [Update an employee](/api#operation-workforce-manager-employees-user-id-put): PUT /workforce/manager/employees/{user_id} — Update an employee by ID.
- [Get availabilities](/api#operation-workforce-availabilities-get): GET /workforce/availabilities — Get availabilities belonging to the current account.
- [Get availability for date](/api#operation-workforce-availabilities-date-get): GET /workforce/availabilities/{date} — Get a availability for date.
- [Update availability for date](/api#operation-workforce-availabilities-date-put): PUT /workforce/availabilities/{date} — Update availability for date.
- [Create a shift question](/api#operation-workforce-manager-shift-questions-post): POST /workforce/manager/shift_questions — Create a shift question.
- [Get shifts](/api#operation-workforce-shifts-get): GET /workforce/shifts — Get shifts belonging to the current account.
- [Get active shifts](/api#operation-workforce-shifts-active-get): GET /workforce/shifts/active — Get active shifts belonging to the current account.
- [Get a shift](/api#operation-workforce-shifts-id-get): GET /workforce/shifts/{id} — Get a shift by ID.
- [Get shift questions](/api#operation-workforce-shifts-id-questions-get): GET /workforce/shifts/{id}/questions — Get shift questions by shift ID.
- [Create a shift answer](/api#operation-workforce-shifts-id-answers-post): POST /workforce/shifts/{id}/answers — Create a shift answer.
- [Get shifts as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-shifts-get): GET /workforce/manager/shifts — Get shifts as manager.
- [Create a shift](/api#operation-workforce-manager-shifts-post): POST /workforce/manager/shifts — Create a shift.
- [Get a shift as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-shifts-id-get): GET /workforce/manager/shifts/{id} — Get a shift as manager by ID.
- [Update a shift as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-shifts-id-put): PUT /workforce/manager/shifts/{id} — Update a shift as a manager by ID.
- [Delete a shift as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-shifts-id-delete): DELETE /workforce/manager/shifts/{id} — Delete a shift as a manager by ID.
- [Create a shift request](/api#operation-workforce-shift-requests-post): POST /workforce/shift_requests — Create a shift request.
- [Update a shift request](/api#operation-workforce-shift-requests-id-put): PUT /workforce/shift_requests/{id} — Update or update a shift request by ID.
- [Delete a shift request](/api#operation-workforce-shift-requests-id-delete): DELETE /workforce/shift_requests/{id} — Delete a shift request by ID.
- [Get shift requests as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-shift-requests-get): GET /workforce/manager/shift_requests — Get shift request as manager.
- [Create a shift request as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-shift-requests-post): POST /workforce/manager/shift_requests — Create a shift request as manager.
- [Get a shift request as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-shift-requests-id-get): GET /workforce/manager/shift_requests/{id} — Get a shift request as manager by ID.
- [Update a shift request as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-shift-requests-id-put): PUT /workforce/manager/shift_requests/{id} — Update a shift request as manager by ID.
- [Get timesheets](/api#operation-workforce-timesheets-get): GET /workforce/timesheets — Get timesheets belonging to the current account.
- [Get a timesheet](/api#operation-workforce-timesheets-id-get): GET /workforce/timesheets/{id} — Get a timesheet by ID.
- [Update an timesheet](/api#operation-workforce-timesheets-id-put): PUT /workforce/timesheets/{id} — Update an timesheet by ID.
- [Delete a timesheet](/api#operation-workforce-timesheets-id-delete): DELETE /workforce/timesheets/{id} — Delete a timesheet by ID.
- [Get timesheets as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-timesheets-get): GET /workforce/manager/timesheets — Get timesheets as manager.
- [Create a timesheet as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-timesheets-post): POST /workforce/manager/timesheets — Create a timesheet as manager.
- [Get a timesheet](/api#operation-workforce-manager-timesheets-id-get): GET /workforce/manager/timesheets/{id} — Get a timesheet as manager by ID.
- [Update an timesheet](/api#operation-workforce-manager-timesheets-id-put): PUT /workforce/manager/timesheets/{id} — Update an timesheet as manager by ID.
- [Bulk update timesheets as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-timesheets-bulk-update-put): PUT /workforce/manager/timesheets/bulk_update — Bulk update timesheets as manager by an array of IDs.
- [Get timesheet items](/api#operation-workforce-timesheet-items-get): GET /workforce/timesheet_items — Get timesheet items for the current account.
- [Create a timesheet item](/api#operation-workforce-timesheet-items-post): POST /workforce/timesheet_items — Create a timesheet item.
- [Get a timesheet item](/api#operation-workforce-timesheet-items-id-get): GET /workforce/timesheet_items/{id} — Get a timesheet item by ID.
- [Update a timesheet item](/api#operation-workforce-timesheet-items-id-put): PUT /workforce/timesheet_items/{id} — Update a timesheet item by ID.
- [Delete a timesheet item](/api#operation-workforce-timesheet-items-id-delete): DELETE /workforce/timesheet_items/{id} — Delete a timesheet item by ID.
- [Get timesheet items](/api#operation-workforce-manager-timesheet-items-get): GET /workforce/manager/timesheet_items — Get timesheet items belonging to the current account.
- [Create a timesheet item](/api#operation-workforce-manager-timesheet-items-post): POST /workforce/manager/timesheet_items — Create a timesheet item.
- [Get a timesheet item as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-timesheet-items-id-get): GET /workforce/manager/timesheet_items/{id} — Get a timesheet item as manager by ID.
- [Update a timesheet item as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-timesheet-items-id-put): PUT /workforce/manager/timesheet_items/{id} — Update a timesheet item as manager by ID.
- [Get attendances](/api#operation-workforce-attendances-get): GET /workforce/attendances — Get attendances for the current account.
- [Create an attendance](/api#operation-workforce-attendances-post): POST /workforce/attendances — Create an attendance.
- [Get active attendances](/api#operation-workforce-attendances-active-get): GET /workforce/attendances/active — Get active attendance for the current account.
- [Get an attendance](/api#operation-workforce-attendances-id-get): GET /workforce/attendances/{id} — Get an attendance by ID.
- [Update an attendance](/api#operation-workforce-attendances-id-put): PUT /workforce/attendances/{id} — Update an attendance by ID.
- [Get attendances](/api#operation-workforce-manager-attendances-get): GET /workforce/manager/attendances — Get attendances belonging to the current account.
- [Create an attendance](/api#operation-workforce-manager-attendances-post): POST /workforce/manager/attendances — Create an attendance.
- [Get active attendances as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-attendances-active-get): GET /workforce/manager/attendances/active — Get active attendances as manager.
- [Get an attendance as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-attendances-id-get): GET /workforce/manager/attendances/{id} — Get an attendance as manager by ID.
- [Update an attendance as manager](/api#operation-workforce-manager-attendances-id-put): PUT /workforce/manager/attendances/{id} — Update an attendance as manager by ID.
- [Register a device](/api#operation-devices-post): POST /devices — Register a mobile device for push notifications.
- [Get tags](/api#operation-tags-get): GET /tags — Get all tags.
- [Create a tag](/api#operation-tags-post): POST /tags — Create a tag
- [Get a tag](/api#operation-tags-id-get): GET /tags/{id} — Get a tag object.
- [Delete a tag](/api#operation-tags-id-delete): DELETE /tags/{id} — Delete a tag object.
- [List syncs](/api#operation-syncs-get): GET /syncs — Get a paginated list of sync operations for the current team.
- [Get sync details](/api#operation-syncs-id-get): GET /syncs/{id} — Get detailed information about a specific sync operation.
- [Get addon actions](/api#operation-addons-package-actions-get): GET /addons/{package}/actions — Get all actions for an addon.
- [Get installed addon](/api#operation-addons-addon-package-install-get): GET /addons/{addon_package}/install — Get an installed addon.
- [Install addon](/api#operation-addons-addon-package-install-post): POST /addons/{addon_package}/install — Install an addon.
- [Update installed addon](/api#operation-addons-addon-package-install-put): PUT /addons/{addon_package}/install — Update an installed addon.
- [Delete installed addon](/api#operation-addons-addon-package-install-delete): DELETE /addons/{addon_package}/install — Delete an installed addon.
- [Get addon permissions](/api#operation-addons-addon-package-install-permissions-get): GET /addons/{addon_package}/install/permissions — Get all addon permission objects.
- [Get addon permission](/api#operation-addons-addon-package-install-permissions-name-get): GET /addons/{addon_package}/install/permissions/{name} — Get an addon permission object.
- [Update addon permission](/api#operation-addons-addon-package-install-permissions-name-put): PUT /addons/{addon_package}/install/permissions/{name} — Update an addon permission object.
- [Get all addon settings](/api#operation-addons-addon-package-install-settings-get): GET /addons/{addon_package}/install/settings — Get all addon settings objects.
- [Get addon setting](/api#operation-addons-addon-package-install-settings-name-get): GET /addons/{addon_package}/install/settings/{name} — Get an addon setting object.
- [Update addon settings](/api#operation-addons-addon-package-install-settings-name-put): PUT /addons/{addon_package}/install/settings/{name} — Update an addon settings object.
- [Delete addon setting](/api#operation-addons-addon-package-install-settings-name-delete): DELETE /addons/{addon_package}/install/settings/{name} — Delete an addon setting object.
- [Delete a device](/api#operation-devices-id-delete): DELETE /devices/{id} — Delete a mobile device.
- [Get the current account QR code image](/api#operation-me-qr-get): GET /me/qr — Get the current account QR code image.
- [Get a teams](/api#operation-teams-id-get): GET /teams/{id} — Get a teams object by slug.
- [Get a user](/api#operation-users-id-get): GET /users/{id} — Get a user object by slug.
- [Get vendor orders](/api#operation-vendors-vendor-team-id-orders-get): GET /vendors/{vendor_team_id}/orders — Get all vendor orders.
- [Create an vendor order](/api#operation-vendors-vendor-team-id-orders-post): POST /vendors/{vendor_team_id}/orders — Create an vendor order
- [Get an vendor order](/api#operation-vendors-vendor-team-id-orders-id-get): GET /vendors/{vendor_team_id}/orders/{id} — Get an vendor order object.
- [Update an vendor order](/api#operation-vendors-vendor-team-id-orders-id-put): PUT /vendors/{vendor_team_id}/orders/{id} — Update an vendor order object.
- [Cancel an vendor order](/api#operation-vendors-vendor-team-id-orders-id-delete): DELETE /vendors/{vendor_team_id}/orders/{id} — Cancel an vendor order object.
- [Search users](/api#operation-users-search-get): GET /users/search — Get all users who's mobile number matches the given search term.
- [Search addons](/api#operation-addons-search-get): GET /addons/search — Get all addons matching the given search term.
- [Search actions](/api#operation-actions-search-get): GET /actions/search — Search actions by term.
- [Verify a user account](/api#operation-users-verify-get): GET /users/verify — Verify a user account using the given pin code.

## MCP Server

- [tommy](/mcp): Tommy workforce management MCP server. This reference is a placeholder for the RubyLLM and MCP switchover; tools, resources, and prompts will be populated from the Rails MCP registry.
